title: Better Healthbar
description:
A Minecraft datapack and mod that displays health bars and damage indicators for almost all mobs.

Everything can be configured in the in-game chat menu.
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ad6c0281e67963fbf4d2ffcdac2784d398fd213_0.webp)

## 📖 Description A fully customizable datapack for Minecraft 1.20.6+ that displays a health bar for nearly all mobs. This datapack also includes a damage display showing how much damage you did. The health bar and damage display can both be customized to suit your preferences and colorful imagination while maintaining the Minecraft aesthetic. It works seamlessly in both single-player and multiplayer modes. ## ⭐ Features • Functional Healthbars that update instantly.
• Works with custom names from nametags.
• Exclude specific mobs from the healthbar.
• 100% Multiplayer supported.
• It's simple to adjust settings using the chat menu.
## 🎗️ Compatibility ![compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98bfe4deddef20a5bbbc6e7ad401f749c66bbf25.png) ## ⚙️ Installation For version v3 and above, you only need to enter the world after installing it and it should automatically install everything for you.
Use `/trigger HB.Settings` to open the chat menu. ## Uninstalling Use `/function healthbar:handler/settings/uninstall` to uninstall everything and only then you can remove the datapack/mod. This makes sure that there is nothing left of the healthbars. ## ⚡️IMPORTANT REMINDER You need permissions to use commands to install and configure the settings!
This means that commands are turned on in singleplayer and OP in multiplayer.
